title: Polymer and Plastic Body Parts
entry_mechanism: International automotive plastics manufacturer JV using SABIC specialty polymer compounds
executive_summary:
Polymer automotive components — bumpers, fascias, fender liners, door panels, trim, and exterior body parts — are injection moulded from SABIC-produced polypropylene and engineering plastic compounds. This is arguably the most directly vertically integrated manufacturing opportunity in the entire Saudi automotive programme: SABIC produces the feedstock material, Saudi manufacturers mould it into vehicle components, and Saudi-assembled vehicles consume the components.

Node AU-4 targets Saudi injection moulding of automotive polymer body parts, beginning with bumper assemblies and exterior trim for Saudi-assembled vehicles. The manufacturing processes (large-part injection moulding, painting, assembly) are well-established and the tooling investment (injection moulds, paint booth) is the primary capital barrier. SABIC's AM-3 specialty polymer compound programme provides the optimised automotive-grade material supply.

companies.name: Plastic Omnium
companies.rationale: Plastic Omnium is the world's largest automotive exterior parts manufacturer. Non-US technology with active Gulf market interest.

companies.name: Magna International (Exteriors)
companies.rationale: Magna Exteriors produces polymer body parts globally and has established international JVs.

companies.name: Flex-N-Gate
companies.rationale: Flex-N-Gate is a major OEM bumper system supplier with international manufacturing.

companies.name: Yanfeng (Exterior)
companies.rationale: Yanfeng produces automotive exteriors and has emerging market manufacturing JV experience.

companies.name: Vibracoustic (Freudenberg)
companies.rationale: Freudenberg produces automotive NVH components and has active Gulf automotive market engagement.

partners.name: SABIC Automotive Compounds (AM-3 link)
partners.upgrade: SABIC automotive-grade PP compound for bumper moulding; Plastic Omnium-SABIC compound qualification; direct cascade from AM-3 specialty compounds to AU-4 body parts

partners.name: KAEC Automotive Zone
partners.upgrade: Automotive plastics manufacturing zone at KAEC; shared paint booth infrastructure; injection moulding technology centre

partners.name: Saudi OEM Assembly
partners.upgrade: Saudi-assembled vehicle bumper and trim sourcing from Saudi manufacturer; IATF 16949 qualification support; localisation scorecard credit

partners.name: TVTC / Plastics Manufacturing Training
partners.upgrade: Injection moulding technician programme; automotive plastics quality training; Saudi polymer parts operator pipeline
